title: LangGraph
oneLiner: A graph framework for stateful AI agent workflows.
summary: LangGraph is a graph-based framework for building stateful agent workflows with durable execution, branching, and human review paths.
whyItMatters: Most serious agent workflows need state, branching, recovery, and review. LangGraph gives builders a more explicit structure than one-off prompt chains.
seoTitle: LangGraph: Open-source framework for stateful AI agents
seoDescription: A concise editorial profile of LangGraph, including what it does, who it is best for, license, repo, and related open-source AI resources.
shareDescription: A graph framework for stateful AI agent workflows.
